title: Per-seed (T_00, T_ii) values across the nine-regime lattice ladder for the constant-hypothesis chi^2 test of Phase R
scope: Phase F per-node Hilbert-variation reconstruction, computed per seed (4 seeds per regime) on the parent-corpus D1 lattice data (d1_lattice_payload/ for P0..P5 and d1_lattice_payload/p[6-8]/ for P6..P8). Provides the seed-level dispersion needed to test whether the apparent N-trend in (T_00, T_ii) is genuine or seed-noise-dominated.

constant_hypothesis_test.verdict: The constant-hypothesis (T_00, T_ii are N-INDEPENDENT constants modulated by seed noise) is NOT rejected at p < 0.05. chi^2/dof of 1.5-1.6 indicates the apparent N-trend in the per-regime means is at the same order of magnitude as per-seed dispersion; the data do not distinguish 'genuine smooth N-trend' from 'pooled constant plus seed noise'.

inter_intra_dispersion.verdict: Inter-regime CV (N-trend) is SMALLER than intra-regime CV (per-seed), with ratio 0.65-0.70 < 1. The N-trend in the per-regime means is therefore not significantly larger than the seed-noise floor, consistent with the constant-hypothesis verdict above.

implications.phase_L_asymptotic_window_reading: The 'asymptotic-window mean w_eff ~ -0.31' of Phase L is properly read as the POOLED w_eff over all 9 regimes, NOT as a convergence to an asymptote distinct from finite-N values.
implications.phase_M_continuum_extrapolation: The alpha=2/3 continuum extrapolation w_eff^inf ~ -0.28 is a hypothesis-fixed extrapolation; with the underlying N-trend not significantly larger than seed noise, the continuum value is NOT empirically forced. The pooled value -0.31 is closer to a load-bearing readout than the alpha=2/3 extrapolation.
implications.phase_O_intercept_extraction: The Phase O intercept reading 'vortex-zero limit at w_bg = -1/3 to 0.4%' is doubly weakened: (i) by the Phase O' regressor-choice ambiguity (any monotonic N-functional gives an intercept ratio in [-0.39, -0.27]), and (ii) by the Phase R verdict that the underlying N-trend is borderline-consistent with no trend at all.
implications.phase_P_cosmic_string_match: The cosmic-string-network EOS w_string = -1/3 (Vilenkin-Shellard) is consistent with the pooled w_eff = -0.310 within the 9-regime seed-noise envelope (pooled CV ~ 7%; w_string differs by 7.4% from the pooled value); the structural identification at the EOS-class level survives Phase R, but the precise '-1/3 within 0.4%' claim does not.
implications.phase_Q_geometric_quantization: The integer-quantization of triangle winding (Phase Q geometric finding) is independent of T_munu regression and is unaffected by Phase R; the lattice still carries actual U(1) topological vortex defects.

computation_provenance.T_munu_formula: Same as Phase F (verify_lambda_frobenius_exact_offdiagonal.py), per seed: T_00 = 0.5*Z_Xi*var(Xi) + kappa_Xi*var(|Psi|) + zeta_1*omega*<|grad Psi|^2>_node + zeta_3*omega*K_rec; T_ii = -(0.5*Z_Xi + kappa_Xi + zeta_1*omega)*<|grad Psi|^2>/3.
